source: Hand-authored over the captured win-lateral-movement offline run (Proof A, no lab). Techniques verified against MITRE ATT&CK G1017 + T1543.003 / T1047 (2026-07-10).
notes: Proof A oracle: proves the multi-axis image grader against a REAL sealed run's actual
verdict.json fields, with no lab/toolchain/image. Technique codes are stored as alias
sets so ATT&CK renumbering (e.g. T1070.001 vs T1685.005) cannot silently rot the oracle.
hash and registry_value IOC types are unscored: the producer verdict.json has no such
channel yet (indicators lacks a registry key category and hashes is empty in practice).

technique.name: Create or Modify System Process: Windows Service (SpoolFool)
